scope: V1 gallery active before/after visual role gate
rule: This file is not a substitute for looking at the images. Update it only after direct visual inspection of the actual current image files/contact sheet. Filenames, alt text, catalog stages, old reports, and DOM order are not enough.

cases.visual_reviewer: Codex local visual check, limited by user review requirement
evidence: direct local image inspection of both preview files
before_visual_signs: root/base area is still protected and not integrated into the final terrace composition
after_visual_signs: same low pine is placed into the terrace garden setting
composition reads as a settled placement case, not a pruning transformation
do_not_claim: do not call this crown transformation
cases.risk: Verified as a placement/installation story only. It remains misleading if described as pruning or rescue.

cases.visual_reviewer: Codex local visual inspection of current image files
evidence: direct local image inspection of case-svichky-before.webp and case-svichky-after.webp
current image SHA256 hashes recorded on 2026-06-26
before_visual_signs: multiple young green pine candles are still long and upright before hand shortening
frame reads as close botanical detail before the candle work, not a finished full-tree result
after_visual_signs: gloved hand is pinching or shortening the candle by hand
shortened candle and visible future buds show the seasonal technique in progress
do_not_claim: do not call this a full-tree before/after transformation
do not claim overall crown restructuring from this detail pair
do not infer same-tree continuity beyond the candle-work detail shown
cases.risk: Verified as a close-detail seasonal candle-work case only. It should not be described as a complete tree transformation.

cases.visual_reviewer: Codex local visual check after user screenshot correction
evidence: direct local image inspection of hecke-niwaki-nachher-01.webp and hecke-niwaki-vorher-02.webp
user screenshot correction in current Codex thread on 2026-06-25
before_visual_signs: rougher and less controlled outer hedge line in site context
reads as a pre-correction context frame despite the filename containing nachher
after_visual_signs: hedge mass reads as controlled and rounded
cleaner finished form despite the filename containing vorher
do_not_claim: do not trust the filename words vorher/nachher
do not mark the controlled rounded frame as before
do not mark the rougher site-context frame as after
cases.risk: Filename labels are misleading. Future edits must use visual evidence, not filename text.
